allow: PowerShell($paths = @\("C:\\xampp\\php\\php.exe", "C:\\php\\php.exe", "C:\\laragon\\bin\\php"\); foreach \($p in $paths\) { if \(Test-Path $p\) { Write-Output "FOUND: $p" } }; $c = Get-Command php -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($c\) { Write-Output "PATH php: $\($c.Source\)" }; $cc = Get-Command composer -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue; if \($cc\) { Write-Output "PATH composer: $\($cc.Source\)" })

PowerShell(Get-ChildItem "C:\\" -Directory | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "xampp|wamp|laragon|php" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName; Get-ChildItem "C:\\Program Files","C:\\Program Files \(x86\)" -Directory -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Where-Object { $_.Name -match "php|composer|xampp" } | Select-Object -ExpandProperty FullName)
